codeReview.summary: The feature achieves the requested decomposition of PurchasingService into focused services and keeps PurchasingService as a compatibility facade. PurchaseOrderService, GoodsReceiptService, and PurchaseReturnService contain real domain logic and stay under the 500-line threshold, with purchasing callers still routed through the facade controllers. The decomposition preserves key behaviors: GRN idempotency/quantity validation, return outstanding non-negative guard (RETURN_EXCEEDS_OUTSTANDING), and purchase/GRN status updates tied to receiving/invoicing flows.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Scrutiny review subagent spawning is currently brittle when mission model settings use an unavailable custom worker model, causing Task-based reviewer launches to fail before review execution.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Current mission model settings file sets workerModel to custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.3-codex-xhigh-pro (/home/realnigga/.factory/missions/9cf481ca-5e0f-423d-8241-8364a13a7137/model-settings.json), while Task calls failed with 'Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.3-codex-xhigh-pro' and listed only '5.3 codex ...' custom aliases as valid.

summary: Pass. Purchasing decomposition is materially implemented (not wrapper-only), facade compatibility is preserved, and the targeted purchasing invariants remain enforced.
